x-enumeration-literals.name: General Journal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Used for non-routine or manual entries: accruals, adjustments, corrections, reclassifications.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Recurring Journal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Templates that repeat periodically (monthly rent, amortization, depreciation top-side postings).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Accrual Journal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Used for period-end accruals and deferrals (expenses, revenues). Often reverses automatically.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjustment Journal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Audit adjustments, top-side entries, year-end true-ups. Usually restricted access.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reversing Journal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Entries created with reversal logic for the next period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Subledger Journal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Auto-generated entries from sub-ledgers (AP, AR, FA, Inventory, Payroll).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payroll Journal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Records payroll expenses, taxation, benefits, and liabilities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Intercompany Journal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Used for intercompany transactions and eliminations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Consolidation Journal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Used during group consolidation for eliminations and adjustments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Journal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tax-specific postings separate from GAAP/IFRS books.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Budget Journal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Stores budget or forecast values (not actual transactions).
